case_title: JOHNSON, JAMES C. VS CCSF, DEPT OF PARKING & TRAFFIC

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, JAMES C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CCSF, DEPT OF PARKING & TRAFFIC $50.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $72.00, DEFT YEE, BOND FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $100.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, JAMES C. AS TO DEFENDANT CCSF, DEPT OF PARKING & TRAFFIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-30-2004 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CCSF, DEPT OF PARKING & TRAFFIC
DEFT'S BOND YEE'S BRIEF&DECLARATION FILED;DECLARAT ION OF BOB LONG FILED;DECLARATION OF SARA DI BENE FILED;FOLDER AT RM.506.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, JAMES C. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CCSF, DEPT OF PARKING & TRAFFIC PLAINTIFF WAS REQUIRED TO FOLLOW S.F. SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF SEP-23-2004, GRANTED
